WinUI FocusVisualMargin = −3 (AppBarButton_themeresources.xaml:135); the engine draws the ring (E1).

Height

Root height; null = square (= Size). Set for stretched chrome buttons — the WinUI TitleBar back/pane are 40w × 44h (Stretch in the 48px bar with Margin 2).

public float? Height { get; init; }

float?

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
